videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: Standard is Cooked
videos.description:
The big Standard Spotlight Series event happened this weekend, and now I can confidently say that the format is cooked. Why is it cooked and where could and should we go from here? Let's discuss!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

#MTG #magicthegathering #mtgstandard
